programme.title: Catering Christmas
programme.desc: A fledgling caterer, Mandy Frost, is hired by Jean Kimberly, the perfectionistic director of the renowned Kimberly Foundation, to cater this year's annual Christmas Gala dinner. Things get complicated when Mandy falls for Jean's nephew, Carson, 30s, a travel photographer with no desire to take over the family's foundation... until his aunt assigns him to the task of making sure the catered dinner goes perfectly.

programme.title: A Merry Christmas Wish
programme.desc: An NYC advertising executive returns to her hometown to sell the family farm, but instead reconnects with her childhood friend and gets involved with organizing the yearly Winter Wonderland, which takes place on the property.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Holiday
programme.desc: In search of her big break, a reporter (Brittany Underwood) arranges a Christmas interview with a European Prince visiting the states (Jonathan Stoddard). Will her breakout story become a love story?

programme.title: A Christmas Less Traveled
programme.desc: A local business owner finds an audio cassette in the player of her recently departed dad's classic red truck. The message instructs Desi to go on a holiday road trip down memory lane where she meets a man who needs her help and who offers help in return.

programme.title: Catering Christmas
programme.desc: A fledgling caterer, Mandy Frost, is hired by Jean Kimberly, the perfectionistic director of the renowned Kimberly Foundation, to cater this year's annual Christmas Gala dinner. programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E1 El Nino
programme.desc: Chasing El Niño follows Chris Benchetler on an epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the vast slopes of British Columbia. Joined by longtime friends Bryan Fox, Scotty Smith, and Canadian pro skier Nick McNutt, Chris explores previously inaccessible terrain, searches for perfect powder, and faces challenging weather conditions. Along the way, the crew embraces the joy of skiing, building creative jumps at their campsite and making the most of every moment on the mountain. This episode captures the thrill of exploration, friendship, and the relentless pursuit of epic lines.

programme.title: S1E2 El Nino
programme.desc: Chris Benchetler continues his epic skiing adventure from California’s Mammoth Mountain and the Sierra Nevada backcountry to the massive slopes of British Columbia. This time, X Games gold medalist Jossi Wells joins him for "The Sierra Trifecta," tackling skiing, climbing, and biking all in a single day. Chris and his crew hike 6,000 vertical feet through rugged rock fields to chase the last snow of the season in the Sierras, pushing their limits and capturing every thrilling moment.

programme.title: S3E1 Water
programme.desc: The very best of GoPro Water Sports.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a spot in his high school's Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio is living proof that hard work and dedication pays off. But what happens when things don't go as planned? Find out in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.
